title: Manufacturing Engineer - NHPC Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - NHPC Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, NHPC Holdings Services in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NHPC Holdings Services:
NHPC Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
